title: Dialect-Robust Automatic Speech Recognition for Rural Bangla Agrarian Communities
authors: N. Islam, M. Rahman, S. Akter
venue: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: This work introduces a self-supervised acoustic model trained on over 12,000 hours of spontaneous agricultural speech gathered across six divisions in Bangladesh. We achieve state-of-the-art results in low-resource dialect-robust word error rate (WER) reduction.

title: Heterogeneous Knowledge Graphs for Multi-Vector Crop Disease Inference in Low-Bandwidth Networks
authors: N. Islam, K. Hasan, T. Chowdhury
venue: International Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) - Agri-AI Workshop
abstract: We present a unified graph neural network architecture that maps crop-to-disease, weather-to-risk, and treatment-to-ecology dependencies. The lightweight network allows offline RAG inference with minimal latency on mid-range Android devices.

title: YOLOv8-Leaf: Mobile-Optimized Convolutional Neural Networks for Fungal Leaf Disease Diagnostics
authors: S. Sultana, N. Islam, A. K. Azad
venue: Journal of Agricultural Electronics and Informatics
abstract: This study details the construction and pruning of a highly compressed convolutional network designed to segment leaf rust and spot lesions in real-world lighting conditions without server-side processing pipelines.

title: A Dialect-Inclusive Agri-Corpus Catalog of Rural Bangladesh: Collection, Annotation, and Validation
authors: M. S. Hossain, F. T. Johra, N. Islam
abstract: We detail the curation and validation process of our regional agrarian speech repository. We discuss the linguistic challenges of term mapping and phonology across diverse farming districts in North and South Bengal.
